post_halt_resolution.lowered_bar_summary: Phase-1-PARTIAL-honest: F4 removed (Phase 2A); Block E removed (5 inputs covering Phase 2A-B crown-jewel surface checks routed to 2A.7/2B.7 walkthroughs); Block C downgraded to endpoint-contract-only (HTTP 201 + UploadResponse, no parser/chunks/T7); F15 documented as single EvidenceContract v1.0 JSON (not ZIP) with all 15 required top-level fields enumerated; corpus is now 17 inputs (was 22).
